notes: Structured from existing markdown unit card.

book.title: Tom Sawyer Unit Card - 6th Grade
book.author: Mark Twain (Adapted for 6th Grade)
book.description: Book: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer (BedrockELA Adaptation) Author: Mark Twain (Adapted for 6th Grade) Grade Level: 6th Unit Length: 6 weeks (30 days) Chapters: 24 adapted chapters

weeks.title: Week 1 (Days 1-5)
reading: Tom and Aunt Polly - Introduction to Tom's mischievous nature
The Whitewashing - Tom tricks friends into whitewashing the fence
Showing Off for Becky - Tom meets Becky Thatcher
The Engagement - Tom and Becky's "engagement"
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 2 (Days 6-10)
reading: The Graveyard - Tom and Huck witness Injun Joe's murder
The Blood Oath - Boys swear to keep the secret
The Town in Shock - Aftermath of the murder
Pirates of Jackson's Island - Boys run away
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 3 (Days 11-15)
reading: Life on the Island - Pirate adventures
Their Own Funeral - Tom appears at his own funeral
Tom's Dream Trick - Tom's clever lie
Making Up with Becky - Tom takes Becky's punishment
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 4 (Days 16-20)
reading: Examination Day - School testing
A Miserable Summer - Tom's boring summer
The Trial - Tom testifies against Injun Joe
Treasure Hunting - Boys search for buried treasure
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 5 (Days 21-25)
reading: The Haunted House - Finding gold but losing it
Tracking Number Two - Following Injun Joe
The Picnic - School picnic and cave exploration
Huck Saves the Widow - Huck prevents robbery
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 6 (Days 26-30)
reading: Lost in the Cave - Tom and Becky trapped
Escape - Tom finds a way out
Injun Joe's Fate - Villain meets his end
Tom Sawyer's Gang - Tom plans future adventures
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.
